reference: I have an extremely tight scalene muscle, and it has been over a month. It seems to pinch a nerve that tingles on the right side of my neck. I have been doing some stretches with some relief, but overall this problem continues. Most of the time I do not notice it, but I always feel it when I play guitar. Do you have any suggestions besides seeing a doctor?
text: I have an extremely tight scaly muscle, and it has been over a month. It seems to pinch a nerve that tingles on the right side of my neck. I have been doing some stretches with some relief, but overall, this problem continues. Most of the time, I do not notice it, but I always feel it when I play the guitar. Do you have any suggestions besides seeing a doctor?
